item.title: 🚨Tejaswini HYDERABAD Techie De@th Mystery | What Happened at 2:30 AM in Peerzadiguda? | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨Tejaswini HYDERABAD Techie De@th Mystery | What Happened at 2:30 AM in Peerzadiguda? | VR Raja
హైదరాబాద్ సాఫ్ట్‌వేర్ అమ్మాయి మిస్టరీ: జాబ్ వదిలేసిన అమ్మాయి రోజుకు 3500 అద్దె ఎందుకు కడుతోంది? గుడిలో ఆ విగ్రహం ఏమైంది?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Hyderabad loni Peerzadiguda lo jarigina oka highly mysterious and heartbreaking incident gurinchi detail ga discuss cheddam. Bengaluru lo high-paying software job vadilesi vachina 25-year-old Tejaswini, nela ki laksha rupayala rent unna penthouse lo enduku untondi? Aa building paina nadustunna commercial lodge ki ee case ki emaina link unda? Ardharatri 2:30 ki aame thallini room lo lock chesi bayataku vachina taruvata, temple lo em jarigindi? Missing ayina ammavari vigraham venuka unna asalu mystery enti?
In this deep dive into one of Hyderabad's most unsettling modern mysteries, we cover: 🔸 The Psychological Trauma: How a brilliant software engineer fell into severe depression due to extreme IT work pressure and parental marital disputes. 🔸 The Financial Mystery: Uncovering the shocking logic behind a jobless woman paying 3,500 rupees per day for a rented flat below a commercial lodge. 🔸 The Bizarre Night: The unexplained timeline of events at 2:30 AM, including the CCTV footage of a terrified passerby and her visit to the Beerappa Swamy temple. 🔸 The Missing Idol: The ongoing DRF search operations to find the heavy stone idol that vanished into the lake along with her. 🔸 The Investigation Angles: How police are analyzing her mobile data, bank statements, and the suspicious behavior of the family to solve this complex puzzle.
Ee mysterious case venuka asalu financial trap unda leka pure psychological breakdown anukuntunnara? Comment your thoughts below!
#VRRaja #PeerzadigudaMystery #HyderabadNews #MentalHealthAwareness #TrueStory #UnsolvedMystery

Why a Telugu Podcast?
Raw Talks with VK is the 1st Telugu podcast channel dedicated to Building an Intellectual Telugu community.
Our goal through these podcasts is to give a deeper understanding and exposure to various topics that can be beneficial to everyone.
Through Raw Talks, I intend to bring conversations on business, marketing, finance, psychology, and more. I aim to empower Telugu audiences with the same level of information as global communities.
We believe knowledge is power, and this platform aims to ensure that our Telugu-speaking community continues to grow personally and professionally.

Wise TV: Because Reality is the Realest Joke of All Welcome to Wise TV, the only content source unafraid to expose the absurdity of modern civilization—one satirical mic drop at a time. While other networks scramble to take themselves seriously, we’ve mastered the art of reporting on a world that feels like it’s written by a team of sleep-deprived comedy writers.
🚀 Billionaires buying artificial problems while ignoring real ones? We’re on it. 🍵 A new trend where people drink dewdrops infused with WiFi? We’ll investigate. 🛑 Governments banning plastic straws while dumping oil into the ocean? You bet we’ll call that out.
We twist the content, bend reality (just slightly), and leave you wondering whether the content we cover are real or just an elaborate prank by the universe itself.
At Wise TV, we don’t just deliver the content—we make you question why it even exists in the first place.
Tune in. Rethink. Explore. Laugh. Repeat.

📝 Song Lyrics 📝 Pallavi : Kallolamedho repake lalana My loving lady .. don't begin the sweet chaos of love Kadavatho saage nadakale hoynaa It's the beauty , As you walk past carrying a pot of water (at your wait) Mallela theerapu maguveee jaana You’re seem as if a jasmine fragrance holding - shore , dear woman Chaandini naiya chandana mena Chandini ( like my moonlight) … or you are a gentle body made of soothing sandalwood?
Kudi vaipununde hrudayam kosana At some deep corner within, From the right side of my heart.. Andhela sadilo cherenule maina.. With soft grace, tapping anklets you’ve reached my soul ,my myna.. Amantham premalo padipothunnaa I’m completely falling into love.. with you all of a sudden Chandini naiya chadivesthunnaa I'm Chanting your name n keep reading you like a beautiful poem ----------------- Bhoogolam antha vethikaaney cheliyaa I searched the whole world for a soul like you .. Alasina kshaname kalisaaney And in a hopelessly tired moment, I finally found you Ninnu minchi kanapadare rajiyaa There’s no one more beautiful than you ( ~ be it your heart's beauty, and angellic appeal ) Manase chebuthondhey… My mind itself is saying that .. to me . ---------------------- Chekkili painey thelina chinukai Like a drop resting on the cheek Chakkani varame naadhauthuntey… If you become my precious gift, as such Swargamedhi neeku saati raanundhee ?! I cannot compare that life (in togetherness with you ) even with a life at heaven
Pre-Hook : Okkasaarilaa choosthaavante.. If you..felt to just look at me once… Vandha yellila jeevinchesthaane I could live a hundred years with that one sparkle you throw at me with sight
Prema picchidhey anukunnaavantey… If you think .. my love is madness... And it's only yours Ney ninnu gelichinatte… Then I’ve already won you !
Manasittey jaaripoye kadhanam yedho kadhilindhi… Or Gaalullo telipoye megham vaanai jaarindhi…
Melting love tale of ours has begun from now , dear Or Like a cloud drifting in air, turned into rain & touched me !
Hook : Churiya churiyaa maaye halaa O magical one ( with your bangles ) , you’ve created a sweet illusion… Kaatuka kallake mathi chedenaa chalaa Your kajal eyes have stolen my senses Preminchesaa ho rasagullaa I’ve fallen in love, my sweety ( rasagulla) Manthram nuvve Chandini Naiyaa You are the boundless magic spell itself, O Chandini Naiya…
Verse - 2 : Rangulevo naa madhi kadduthundhi New colors of hers .. she add it to my heart… Harivillu kooda thaanavthu undhi She has become the rainbow with all her hues, which is present all the time !
Taarakalaa kanipinche chandam… this beauty.. Is born Like a star (for me with its radiance ) Gaaramgaa… koncham dooramgaa… Adding A little warmth… being a little distant…
Sangathulunna sangeetham laa Like a great piece of music composition filled with all those melodic variations.. Manasuni dhoche pothundhi She purely steals my mind n all thoughts .. always
Chitti chilipi chidiyaalaa thane Like a tiny cute playful little bird Yedhanu dongilinchesthundhi She has stolen my heart
Nadumuna thooge hoyale alalu The waist sways as if subtle waves when she walks Nadakaku hamsale poteelu… Swans would fail if they try competing with her
Okka navvutho preme chebithe If love is confessed with just one loving smile sharing consent Janmakinka adhe chaalu… That alone is enough for this lifetime of mine! --------------------------- Enjoy & stay connected with us! 🎶

item.description: 'Her Private Hell', the new film from visionary director Nicolas Winding Refn ('Drive'), which he co-wrote with Esti Giordani, opens in theaters on July 24th.The film stars Sophie Thatcher ('Heretic'), Charles Melton ('May December'), Havana Rose Liu ('Bottoms'), Kristine Froseth ('The First Lady'), and Dougray Scott ('Mission: Impossible II').

item.title: Ibrahim Traore Shocks The World with Deep State Tie Talks TOP SECRET STUFF Part 2
item.description:
follow us on X @ x.com/speaknsee follow us on Rumble @ speaknseeRumble follow us on Facebook @ https://www.facebook.com/speaknsee
Also join the Patron @ speaknsee.com website.
Secret service history reveals disturbing proposals involving food supplies in conflict zones. Learn about the ethics of covert operations.
This account details a specific meeting where agents suggested introducing four products into food supplies destined for regions with terrorist activity. By citing past applications in Africa and Asia, these agents presented these methods as effective solutions, ignoring the significant ethical implications of their plans. This narrative focuses on the intersection of intelligence agency methods and questionable tactical decisions made in the field.
Those interested in historical injustice will find this breakdown highlights how policy was directed eastward with little regard for the local population. We examine the logic used by these agents to justify tampering with resources and the long-term consequences of such strategies. Understanding these past events provides necessary context for how international intervention has been approached.
Subscribe for weekly historical analysis, and comment below on which era of covert operations you want us to examine next.

item.title: 20 MUST-KNOW System Design Concepts For Interviews
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 20 MUST-KNOW System Design Concepts For Interviews
I’ve seen that many engineers understand the tools, but still mix up similar-looking concepts when discussing cloud system design concepts.
Here’s the simplest explanation of some of the most important topics.
• Forward Proxy vs Reverse Proxy → Forward Proxy protects the client → Reverse Proxy protects the server
• CDN vs Cache → CDN delivers content closer to users → Cache stores frequently accessed data
• Load Balancer vs API Gateway → Load Balancer distributes traffic → API Gateway controls and routes API requests
• Monolith vs Microservices → Monolith keeps everything in one application → Microservices split functionality into independent services
• DNS vs Service Discovery → DNS finds public services on the internet → Service Discovery finds services inside distributed systems
Watch till the end to understand all of them, and subscribe for more!
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: 🚨BIG TWIST in IPS Uday Reddy Case | SHOCKING Reality Behind the IPS Trainee Controversy | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨BIG TWIST in IPS Uday Reddy Case | SHOCKING Reality Behind the IPS Trainee Controversy | VR Raja
ఉదయ్ కృష్ణా రెడ్డి ఎపిసోడ్‌లో మైండ్ బ్లాక్ అయ్యే ట్విస్ట్: అసలు ఆ రాత్రి ఏం జరిగింది? ఎవరి వెర్షన్ లో నిజం ఉంది?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, oka ordinary constable nundi All India Rank IPS officer ga edigina Uday Krishna Reddy inspiring story, mariyu ippudu NPA Hyderabad lo aayana face chestunna shocking controversy gurinchi neutral ga discuss cheddam. A fellow women trainee ichina harassment complaint lo nijamenta? Hospital lo unna Uday rasina 2-page letter lo unna hidden details enti? Ee entire episode lo unna grey areas gurinchi without any bias analyze cheddam.
In this unbiased deep dive into the ongoing academy controversy, we cover both sides of the coin: 🔸 The Inspiring Rise: How an orphaned boy from a small village became a symbol of hard work and dedication. 🔸 The Shocking Allegations: A detailed look into the official complaint filed by a fellow trainee officer. 🔸 The Hospitalization Mystery: What exactly happened on Sunday night and what the medical reports revealed about his condition. 🔸 The Counter Narrative: Uday's two-page letter claiming a prior relationship and manipulation by certain individuals. 🔸 Digital Forensics: Why the two mobile phones are the ultimate key to solving this complex case and finding the truth.
Iddari versions vinnaka, ee case lo digital evidence enta crucial ani meeru anukuntunnaru? Comment your thoughts below!

About: I am a journalist with decades of experience across the media spectrum. This current affairs channel is my take on various socio-political, economic and cultural developments in the country, with a focus on Telugu states. I hope to bring out indepth, well-informed and unbiased viewpoints on the developing issues. This channel is an independent media entity without fear or favour. Please do subscribe, like & share the channel to encourage independent journalism.
Twitter: @iamkandula FB: @Ramesh Kandula https://rameshkandula.substack.com/
దేశంలో, మరీ ముఖ్యంగా తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల్లో, జరుగుతున్న రాజకీయ, సామాజిక, ఆర్థిక, సాంస్కృతిక పరిణామాల మీద విశ్లేషణను అందించే ప్రయత్నం ఈ చానెల్. లోతైన, అర్థవంతమైన, పక్షపాత రహిత వ్యాఖ్యానాలు అందించడం ఛానెల్ ప్రధానోద్దేశం. ఏ ఒక్క రాజకీయ భావజాలాన్ని, రాజకీయ పార్టీని నెత్తిన పెట్టుకోకుండా, స్వతంత్ర భావాలతో వ్యవహరించే ఈ ఛానెల్ ను సబ్ స్క్రైబ్ చేసి, ప్రోత్సహించండి.
My books: i) Maverick Messiah - A Political Biography of N.T. Rama Rao, and ii) Amaravati Vivadalu-Vastavalu (Telugu). Both available on www.amazon.in

item.title: 🚨BREAKING PAKISTAN Enters into W@R Warns to Iran | ISRO 100 Scientists Resignations | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨BREAKING PAKISTAN Enters into W@R Warns to Iran | ISRO 100 Scientists Resignations | VR Raja
ఇస్రోలో వందల మంది సైంటిస్టుల రాజీనామా... మరోవైపు ఇరాన్‌కు పాకిస్తాన్ స్ట్రాంగ్ వార్నింగ్! అసలు ఏం జరుగుతోంది?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, manam rendu major topics gurinchi detail ga telusukundam. Modatidi, mana ISRO nundi 100 ki paiga senior scientists enduku sudden ga resign chesi private startups ki veltunnaru? Gaganyaan mission LVM3 director resignation venuka unna reality enti? Rendovadi, Middle East lo perugutunna geopolitical tensions. Saudi tho unna defense pact valla Iran ki Pakistan enduku warning ichindi? Hormuz strait lo jarigina incident valla global oil prices ela impact avtunnayi?
In this deep dive into current national and global events, we cover: 🔸 The ISRO Exodus: Understanding why over 100 top scientists from URSC and VSSC have recently left the prestigious space agency. 🔸 Private Space Boom: How startups like Skyroot and Agnikul are attracting ISRO talent with ESOPs and faster project executions. 🔸 Policy Shift Needed: The growing demand for ISRO to adopt a hybrid workforce model and focus purely on deep-space exploration. 🔸 Middle East Standoff: The complex geopolitical situation where Pakistan has issued strict red lines to Iran due to a strategic defense pact with Saudi Arabia. 🔸 Hormuz Strait Crisis: The global economic impact and rising oil prices following the recent maritime incidents involving commercial vessels.
Ee rendu vishayalalo mee opinion enti? India space future & Global economy ela undabotondi? Comment your thoughts below!
#VRRaja #ISRO #SpaceStartups #Geopolitics #MiddleEastCrisis #CurrentAffairs

Wise TV: Because Reality is the Realest Joke of All Welcome to Wise TV, the only content source unafraid to expose the absurdity of modern civilization—one satirical mic drop at a time. While other networks scramble to take themselves seriously, we’ve mastered the art of reporting on a world that feels like it’s written by a team of sleep-deprived comedy writers.
🚀 Billionaires buying artificial problems while ignoring real ones? We’re on it. 🍵 A new trend where people drink dewdrops infused with WiFi? We’ll investigate. 🛑 Governments banning plastic straws while dumping oil into the ocean? You bet we’ll call that out.
We twist the content, bend reality (just slightly), and leave you wondering whether the content we cover are real or just an elaborate prank by the universe itself.
At Wise TV, we don’t just deliver the content—we make you question why it even exists in the first place.
Tune in. Rethink. Explore. Laugh. Repeat.

item.title: 🚨BREAKING India Beats Elon Musk SPACE X Record | Vikram-1 Skyroot Aerospace Success | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨BREAKING India Beats Elon Musk SPACE X Record | Vikram-1 Skyroot Aerospace Success | VR Raja
సూది బెజ్జంలో శాస్త్రవేత్తల బొమ్మలు... అంతరిక్షంలోకి మోదీ వందేమాతరం! ఫస్ట్ అటెంప్ట్ లోనే అద్భుతం సృష్టించిన హైదరాబాద్ కుర్రాళ్లు!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Indian space history lone oka massive global record create chesina Hyderabad startup "Skyroot Aerospace" gurinchi purtiga telusukundam. SpaceX lanti pedda companies ke 3 attempts pattina orbital launch ni, mana kurrallu first attempt lone ela success chesaru? Asalu ee "Cab to Space" concept enti? Sudi bejjam lo patte micro sculptures ni, PM Modi gari handwritten "Vande Mataram" note ni space loki enduku pamparu?
In this deep dive into India's biggest private space milestone, we cover: 🔸 The Historic Launch: How a 28-year-old average age team successfully launched the Vikram-1 rocket into Low Earth Orbit on their maiden attempt. 🔸 Cab to Space: Understanding Skyroot's revolutionary business model that will change global satellite logistics forever. 🔸 Mind-Blowing Technology: How they built a rocket using an all-carbon composite structure and a 100% 3D-printed Raman liquid engine. 🔸 The T-4:59 Crisis: The intense 35 minutes in the control room when the automated countdown stopped just 5 minutes before launch. 🔸 Bizarre Payloads: The fascinating story behind sending a lab-grown diamond lotus, a micro-rocket inside a needle eye, and PM Modi's handwritten postcard into space. 🔸 Telangana's Aerospace Boom: The crucial role of the Hyderabad ecosystem in making India a global space-tech leader.
What is the most mind-blowing fact about this Skyroot success story? Comment your thoughts below!
#VRRaja #SkyrootAerospace #Vikram1 #SpaceTech #MakeInIndia #ISRO #hyderabadstartups

దేశంలో, మరీ ముఖ్యంగా తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల్లో, జరుగుతున్న రాజకీయ, సామాజిక, ఆర్థిక, సాంస్కృతిక పరిణామాల మీద విశ్లేషణను అందించే ప్రయత్నం ఈ చానెల్. లోతైన, అర్థవంతమైన, పక్షపాత రహిత వ్యాఖ్యానాలు అందించడం ఛానెల్ ప్రధానోద్దేశం. ఏ ఒక్క రాజకీయ భావజాలాన్ని, రాజకీయ పార్టీని నెత్తిన పెట్టుకోకుండా, స్వతంత్ర భావాలతో వ్యవహరించే ఈ ఛానెల్ ను సబ్ స్క్రైబ్ చేసి, ప్రోత్సహించండి.

item.title: 🚨 India's FIRST Hydrogen Train | JAPAN Ex-Minister Blames India? | Green Rail Technology | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨 India's FIRST Hydrogen Train | JAPAN Ex-Minister Blames India? | Green Rail Technology | VR Raja
మేడ్ ఇన్ ఇండియా హైడ్రోజన్ ట్రైన్ అద్భుతం: జపాన్ మంత్రి విమర్శల వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు నిజాలు!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, July 17, 2026 న ఇండియన్ రైల్వేస్ హిస్టరీలోనే ఒక కొత్త గ్రీన్ చాప్టర్ స్టార్ట్ చేసిన మేడ్ ఇన్ ఇండియా హైడ్రోజన్ ట్రైన్ "NaMo Green Rail" గురించి పూర్తి వివరాలు తెలుసుకుందాం. Haryana loni Jind-Sonipat route lo modalaina ee train venuka unna PEMFC technology enti? 99% electrification unna mana deshaniki deeni avasaram ento chuddam. Danto paatu, Mumbai-Ahmedabad Bullet Train project pai Japan ex-minister Hideki Makihara chesina hot comments venuka unna signaling system controversy emiti?
In this highly detailed video, we explore India's massive railway achievements and geopolitical challenges: 🔸 India's Green Milestone: The official launch of the country's first-ever Hydrogen Fuel Cell powered train. 🔸 The Tech Inside: How Hyderabad-based Medha Servo Drives and PEMFC technology turn Hydrogen and Oxygen into electricity, releasing only pure water vapor. 🔸 Cost vs. Future: Why investing 150 crores in this pilot project is an anchor for India's National Green Hydrogen Mission. 🔸 The Bullet Train Clash: A deep dive into why a former Japanese minister alleged delays and criticized Indian officials on social media. 🔸 Signaling Sovereignty: Why Indian railways chose an open global ETCS standard over Japan's proprietary DS-ATC system to avoid dependency. 🔸 Indigenous Speed: How India plans to launch its own high-speed bullet trains by August 15, 2027, from Surat to Bilimora.
What do you think about India's bold move to develop its own bullet train tech and choose global standards? Comment your thoughts below!
#VRRaja #HydrogenTrain #BulletTrainControversy #NaMoGreenRail #IndianRailways #MakeInIndia

item.title: Kubernetes Security BEST Practices In 12 Minutes | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
In this video, I'll be breaking down Kubernetes security layer-by-layer, so you can understand how Kubernetes clusters are actually secured in production.
This was made in partnership w/ Teleport, check it out here: https://fandf.co/44hLY3e
I've covered the five security layers of Kubernetes, including secrets management, network policies, TLS, mTLS, identity-based access, workload hardening, runtime security, audit logging, and the best security practices you'll see in real production environments.
If you’re aiming for roles as a DevOps engineer, cloud engineer, or anyone preparing for CKS (Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist) certification, this video is for you.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 00:48 Layer 1 02:30 Layer 2 04:26 Layer 3 06:14 Layer 4 08:27 Layer 5 10:48 Recap 11:34 Outro

You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: 🚨Flight 914 Time Travel Mystery Explained | Disappeared And Landed After 37 Years? | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨Flight 914 Time Travel Mystery Explained | Disappeared And Landed After 37 Years? | VR Raja
37 ఏళ్ల పాటు గాల్లో మాయమైన విమానం.. 1955లో టేకాఫ్ అయ్యి 1992లో ఎలా ల్యాండ్ అయ్యింది? ప్యాసింజర్లకు వయసు ఎందుకు పెరగలేదు? అసలు ఈ మిస్టరీ వెనుక ఉన్న నిజం ఏంటి? For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com Ee video lo, prapanchanni shake chesina Pan Am Flight 914 mystery gurinchi deep ga analyze cheddam. Internet lo viral avuthunna ee time travel story lo nijam entha? Weekly World News tabloid chesina fake news katha enti? Ee video lo complete clarity isthanu! In this deep dive into the massive aviation mystery, we cover: 🔸 The Disappearance: 1955 lo New York nundi bayaluderina flight radar nundi ela mayam ayyindi? 🔸 The 1992 Landing: Caracas, Venezuela lo 37 years taruvata ee flight ela land ayyindi? 🔸 The Passengers: Passengers evariki okka roju kuda vayasu peragaledu anedi nijamena? 🔸 The Hoax Exposed: Weekly World News tabloid and Bright Side channel ee kathanu ela viral chesayi? 🔸 The 7 Reality Checks: Ee story oka complete urban legend ani prove chese 7 solid points. item.title: 💀 The Mission That Terrified Everyone! | #telugupodcast #rrrshow #indianairforce #military #defence
item.description:
Watch Full Podcast on The RRR Show Channel
Full Podcast Link : https://youtu.be/QYz-5s-Z7M0?si=d3NmFbclO5hqtzMm
What does it really take to become a fighter pilot? What goes through the mind of an Indian Air Force officer during a combat mission? In this exclusive podcast, we dive deep into the world of military aviation, war strategy, leadership, and the untold experiences of one of India's finest air warriors.
This episode covers some of the most fascinating chapters in India's military history and modern air warfare. We begin with the Chushul War and discuss the mindset of the Armed Forces, followed by the story of the Balakot Air Strike and Pakistan's response. We also explore the incredible journey of Wing Commander Abhinandan Varthaman, Kambampati Nachiketa's capture and return, and how the Kargil War began.
The conversation takes you inside the cockpit as we discuss what it feels like to fly alongside Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam, the legendary Tangail Airdrop Mission, and the elite warriors who protect the nation. You'll also learn about the intense selection process, training, discipline, and mindset required to become one of India's elite military personnel.
Ever wondered how a fighter pilot prepares before an attack? This podcast reveals the detailed planning, decision-making, teamwork, and split-second judgment involved in high-risk combat missions. We also discuss India's defence technology evolution, the role of indigenous innovation, modern warfare, and how the Indian Armed Forces continue to strengthen the nation's security.
Beyond the battlefield, this episode offers a rare glimpse into the personal lives of fighter pilots—the sacrifices made by their families, the emotional strength of a fighter pilot's wife, the unbreakable brotherhood among pilots, and the life lessons that come from serving the nation.
Whether you're passionate about military history, the Indian Air Force, geopolitics, aviation, leadership, or inspiring real-life stories, this podcast is packed with insights you won't find in textbooks.
Watch till the end for powerful life lessons, unforgettable war stories, and advice that can change the way you think about courage, discipline, leadership, and service to the nation.
If you enjoyed this conversation, don't forget to Like, Share, and Subscribe for more long-form podcasts featuring inspiring personalities and untold stories.
Raw and Real with Rohith
indian air force, fighter pilot, balakot air strike, kargil war, abhinandan varthaman, indian defence, military podcast, fighter jet, apj abdul kalam, indian army, war stories, indian military, defence technology, air force podcast, geopolitics, military history, national security, indian armed forces, aviation, podcast
#rrrshow #telugupodcast #indianairforce #indianarmy #fighterpilot #balakot #kargilwar #military #defence #warstories

item.title: He Hasn’t Eaten In 19 Days 🤯
Dr Vikrant Singh Thakur Uncensored
The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin.

Based on the series by acclaimed Christian novelist Stephen R. Lawhead, The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin is a unique retelling of the Arthurian legend, not set in the Medieval age of knights in shining armor, but in an earlier time — the end of Roman Britain when pagan tribes warred with Saxon and Pict invaders, and with each other, and the idea of a unified Britain was only a dream. In this tumultuous world Merlin, the son of an Atlantean princess and the bard, Taliesen, pursues his father's vision of a Kingdom of Summer — a Britain unified in peace. But to achieve this dream, Merlin will have to overcome ancient evils and navigate both the fall of the Roman occupation and the rise of Christianity in search of a king who can unite the Island of the Mighty.

item.title: 🚨BREAKING India Warning on POK | How Pakistan Controls POK | Pakistan's Massive Collapse | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨BREAKING India Warning on POK | How Pakistan Controls POK | Pakistan's Massive Collapse | VR Raja
పాకిస్తాన్ ఆక్రమిత కాశ్మీర్ (POK) లో భయంకరమైన ప్రొటెస్ట్స్! ఇంటర్నెట్ షట్‌డౌన్, కర్ఫ్యూలు.. ఇండియాలో కలుస్తాం అని చెప్తున్న ప్రజలు! అసలు POK లో ఏం జరుగుతోంది?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Pakistan Illegal ga occupy cheskunna Kashmir (POK) lo present jarugutunna massive protests gurinchi deep ga analyze cheddam. Pakistan military 16,000 rangers ni dinchi elanti curfew situations create chestondi? India side nundi vacchina strong response enti?
In this deep dive into the POK crisis and geopolitical shift, we cover: 🔸 The Ground Reality: The intense 40-day protests led by JAAC, the suspension of the Muzaffarabad Long March, and the ultimate warning to the Pakistan government. 🔸 Military Crackdown: How 16,000 Pakistani rangers enforced curfews, internet blackouts, and communication blockades in Rawalakot. 🔸 Pro-India Sentiments: The shocking speeches by local leaders declaring POK as illegally occupied and expressing readiness to march towards India. 🔸 The Historical Trap: Understanding the deceptive 1949 Karachi Agreement, the separation of Gilgit-Baltistan, and the illusion of 'Azad Kashmir'. 🔸 The 12-Seat Secret: How the Pakistani military uses a unique legislative reservation system to control POK politics. [Image explaining the legislative assembly seat distribution in POK] 🔸 The 9 Demands: A detailed look into the economic (electricity, flour prices) and political demands of the protesters that Pakistan cannot afford to meet.
Ee crisis chusaka, Pakistan future lo mukkalu avvadam khayam ani meeru anukuntunnara? Let me know in the comments below!
#VRRaja #POKProtests #Geopolitics #PakistanCrisis #AzadKashmir #telugufacts

రష్యా ప్రయోగించిన 3 టన్నుల భారీ పేలోడ్.. పాకిస్తాన్ కు చైనా ఇచ్చిన ఫైనల్ వార్నింగ్.. మిడిల్ ఈస్ట్ లో ట్రంప్ డెసిషన్స్ తో గ్లోబల్ జియోపాలిటిక్స్ లో సంచలనాలు!

Ee video lo, present global scenario ni shake chestunna 3 massive geopolitical updates gurinchi deep ga analyze cheddam. Russia's extreme military shift in Ukraine, Trump's volatile decisions in the Middle East, and the internal collapse of Pakistan due to Balochistan's shocking declaration.
In this deep dive into the massive Global Geopolitical Crisis, we cover: 🔸 Russia's Massive Move: The technical details behind the 3-ton FAB-3000 glide bomb equipped with a UMPK module and its massive impact zone. 🔸 The Middle East Blockade: Trump's controversial U-turn on the 20% protection fee in the Strait of Hormuz and its immediate effect on global crude oil prices. 🔸 Balochistan's Declaration: The 5 key points from the viral independence letter and the complete rejection of Pakistan's military control. 🔸 China's Ultimatum: Beijing's extreme frustration over CPEC security and the severe threat to deploy a private Chinese security force in Pakistan. 🔸 The 72-Hour Deadline: The intense internal panic within the Pakistani military elite and their desperate operations to regain control of the region.

This video examines the key points raised by Indian External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar regarding the evolving landscape of global security. We break down the core arguments presented at the SHANTI National Security Council 2026, specifically focusing on how international relations are shifting toward a framework of peace through participation. This discussion is designed for students of geopolitics and anyone interested in the practical application of modern Indian foreign policy.
By analyzing these statements, viewers will better understand the strategic vision shaping national security in the current climate. item.description:
🚨 India BIG TWIST to China | Modi Countering China's String of Pearls | Trade & Future | VR Raja
చైనా స్ట్రింగ్ ఆఫ్ పెరల్స్ వ్యూహానికి కౌంటర్ గా ఇండియా ప్రయోగిస్తున్న చాణక్యుడి 'మండల థియరీ' ఏంటి? మలాక్కా జలసంధి వద్ద ఇండియా ఎలా ట్రాప్ సెట్ చేసింది?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Indo-Pacific region lo jarugutunna massive geopolitical mind game gurinchi deep ga analyze cheddam. China's expansionist policies and 'String of Pearls' strategy ni counter cheyadaniki India elanti masterplan execute chestondi?
In this deep dive into Asian Geopolitics and India's Strategic Masterclass, we cover: 🔸 China's Expansion & Trap: Understanding the 'String of Pearls' strategy, debt-driven infrastructure (Gwadar, Hambantota), and internal economic issues in China. 🔸 The G-Minus Two Shift: Why Asian nations (Japan, Australia, Indonesia) are stepping up to build an independent security architecture amidst shifting US commitments. 🔸 India's Mandala Strategy: How India is bypassing immediate neighbors and forging deep strategic alliances with the outer ring nations to counter China. 🔸 The Malacca Trap: The strategic significance of Indonesia's Sabang port and India's Great Nicobar port in controlling China's crucial energy route. 🔸 Historic Uranium Deal: The breakthrough administrative arrangement with Australia for civilian uranium supply, ending a decade-long stall. 🔸 Defense Exports & Alliances: Supplying BrahMos to the Philippines and Indonesia, enhancing defense ties with Vietnam, South Korea, and New Zealand. 🔸 The Economic Reality Check: A factual comparison of India vs China in global trade volumes and the urgent need for domestic economic reforms.
Ee geopolitical masterstrokes lo mimmalni athiga attract chesina move edi? Let me know in the comments below!

item.title: AgentOps Maestro: AI-Powered Incident Management with UiPath
item.description:
🚀 AgentOps Maestro showcases how AI Agents can automate the complete enterprise incident lifecycle—from RPA failure detection to root cause analysis, validation, regression test generation, and executive incident reporting.
📌 Content Credit: Inspired by the work of Lakshminarayana E. This content is shared for educational purposes to spread knowledge within the automation community. Full credit to the original creator.
🔍 The Challenge: When an RPA process fails, support teams often spend significant time reviewing logs, classifying incidents, performing root cause analysis, validating fixes, creating regression test cases, and preparing incident reports. These manual activities increase Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR).
💡 The Solution: Using UiPath Maestro, AI Agents, Orchestrator, Queues, and RPA, AgentOps Maestro orchestrates the entire incident management workflow—from incident detection to AI-driven classification, RCA, validation, regression test generation, and executive reporting.
🛠️ Tech Stack: UiPath Maestro, UiPath AI Agents, Orchestrator, Queues, Studio, BPMN, and Agentic AI.
🧪 Enterprise Scenarios: SAP selector failures, API timeouts, and expired credentials.
#rpavault #documentunderstanding #automation #aiagents #rpa #mcp #uipath #uipathtraining

item.title: AI Engineer Basics CRASH COURSE!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: AI Engineer Basics CRASH COURSE!
Here’s the simplest explanation of some of the most important AI concepts every engineer must know.
• AI vs Machine Learning → AI teaches machines to perform intelligent tasks → Machine Learning is how systems learn patterns from data
• Machine Learning vs Generative AI → Machine Learning predicts and classifies → Generative AI creates new content like text, code, images, and audio
• LLM vs AI Agent → LLM responds to prompts → Agents use tools, memory, and workflows to complete tasks
• Training vs Inference → Training teaches the model → Inference uses the trained model
• RAG vs Fine-Tuning → RAG retrieves external knowledge at runtime → Fine-Tuning changes model behavior through additional training
• Prompt Engineering vs Context Engineering → Prompt Engineering improves instructions → Context Engineering shapes the entire workflow around the model
• API vs MCP → APIs connect to individual services → MCP standardizes tool usage for AI systems
Watch till the end to know more about the fundamentals of modern AI systems.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------

I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: Get Ahead Of 99.9% Computer Science Students!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: Get Ahead Of 99.9% Computer Science Students!
The students who stand out aren’t always the ones with the highest grades.
They’re usually the ones who: → Explore different domains early and pick a direction → Reverse-engineer job descriptions instead of guessing what to learn → Use hackathons and projects to build real experience → Get involved in open-source communities → Take OS, Networking, Linux, and Databases seriously → Keep a recruiter-ready LinkedIn profile → Have a target role they’re actively working towards
None of these requires extraordinary talent. Just clarity, consistency, and intentional effort.
The sooner you stop asking “What should I learn?” and start asking “What does my target role require?”, the faster your career starts compounding.
Subscribe for more career tips!

item.title: Why Does Jagannath Fall Sick Before Rath Yatra? | Mystery of Puri Jagannath Rath Yatra 2026
item.description:
Why does Jagannath fall sick for 15 days before Rath Yatra?
Every year before Rath Yatra, Jagannath, Balabhadra, and Subhadra Devi disappear from public darshan after Snana Yatra. Devotees say Jagannath falls sick after the grand ceremonial bath and enters Anasara, a sacred period of rest, recovery, and deep longing. But this is not just a strange temple custom. It reveals one of the most beautiful ideas of Puri: Jagannath is not treated as a distant God, but as a living presence who wakes up, bathes, eats, rests, falls sick, recovers, travels, and returns to his people.
In this video, we explore the deeper meaning behind Snana Yatra, Anasara, Nava Yauvana Darshan, Netrotsava, Rath Yatra, the wooden form of Jagannath, the mystery of Nabakalebara, Brahma Padartha, Mahaprasad, and why the streets of Puri become a moving temple when the chariots begin to roll.
Rath Yatra is not just a festival. It is the return of Jagannath after 15 days of waiting. A God with no visible hands, moved by human hands. A God with no visible feet, carried by human devotion. A God who comes out of the temple so everyone can receive darshan.
Jai Jagannath.
Download the Temple Girl Kids app at templegirl.com for bedtime stories from India’s temples.
#Jagannath #RathYatra #PuriJagannath #JagannathTemple #SnanaYatra #Anasara #Nabakalebara #Mahaprasad #TempleGirl #IndianTemples #SanatanaDharma #Odisha #Puri #JaiJagannath

item.title: Notion AI: Datei-Verarbeitung in mehreren Formaten für Custom Agents
item.description: Custom Agents können jetzt eine größere Bandbreite an Office-Dateien lesen und erstellen – PPTX, XLSX, DOCX und PDF. Damit werden Dateianhänge zu nutzbarem Kontext für einen Agent, statt zu etwas, […]

item.title: Notion Enterprise: Custom-Agent-Aktionen jetzt im Workspace Audit Log
item.description: Das Audit Log von Notion erfasst jetzt die Aktivität von Custom Agents und gibt Enterprise-Admins Einblick, was automatisierte Agents in einem Workspace tun. Aktionen von Agents hinterließen bisher kaum Spuren […]

item.title: Notion Blocks: Nativer HTML-Support mit KI-Generierung
item.description: Notion hat einen nativen HTML-Block ergänzt – einen Ort, um eigenes HTML direkt auf einer Seite einzufügen, hochzuladen oder zu generieren. Er gibt dir eine abgeschottete Fläche für eigenen Webcode, […]

item.title: Notion UX: Schnelleres Erstellen verknüpfter Datenbanken in Teamspaces
item.description: Wenn du einem Teamspace eine Seite hinzufügst, gibt es jetzt einen schnelleren Weg, eine verknüpfte Ansicht einer bestehenden Datenquelle zu erstellen, statt standardmäßig eine brandneue Datenbank anzulegen. Die Änderung zielt […]

item.title: Notion Mail wird eingestellt
item.description: Notion stellt den eigenständigen Notion-Mail-Posteingang – im Web, auf dem Desktop und unter iOS – zum 22. September 2026 ein. Notions erklärte Begründung: Mehr als die Hälfte der Notion-Mail-Nutzer verwaltet […]

item.title: Notion Calendar + Agents lassen sich jetzt mit Outlook verbinden
item.description: Notion Calendar lässt sich jetzt mit Outlook verbinden und reiht sich damit neben Google und iCloud als unterstützter Anbieter in der einheitlichen Notion-Calendar-Oberfläche ein. Für Outlook-Kalender steht dieselbe Bandbreite an […]

item.title: Notion Dashboards: Gruppierte Multi-Source-Filter für Formulas und Rollups
item.description: Die globalen Filter in Notion Dashboards funktionieren jetzt mit Formula- und Rollup-Eigenschaften, sodass ein einzelner Filter mehrere Datenbanken abdecken kann – selbst wenn diese den Wert unterschiedlich speichern. Globale Filter […]

item.title: Notion Calendar: Einheitliche Meeting-Notes-Integration
item.description: Notion führt jetzt pro Termin eine einzige, synchronisierte Meeting Note über die Notion-App und Notion Calendar hinweg, statt getrennter Notizen an beiden Orten. Bisher verhielt sich eine Notiz an einem […]

item.title: Notion Workers: Windows-Unterstützung über npm und winget
item.description: Notion Workers lassen sich jetzt unter Windows über npm und den Windows Package Manager (winget) installieren und bringen die ntn-Entwickler-Toolchain zu Entwicklerinnen und Entwicklern auf Windows. Workers sind Notions gehostete […]

item.title: Claude und Cursor: External Agents jetzt verfügbar
item.description: Notion unterstützt jetzt External Agents – Claude und Cursor sind die ersten beiden –, sodass KI-Tools von Drittanbietern direkt in einem Notion-Workspace arbeiten können, als sichtbare Teilnehmer, die sich per […]

We have used publicly available information, media reports, and legal perspectives available at the time of making this video. The case is currently under investigation, and the accused are presumed innocent unless proven guilty in a court of law.

item.title: 14 Lokas!!
GitOps EXPLAINED For Beginners In 10 Minutes | ArgoCD & FluxCD | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Project link: github.com/vishakhasadhwani/devops-ai-playbook
End-To-End DevOps + AIOps Project: youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
In this video, I’ll break down GitOps from scratch so you can understand how modern Kubernetes deployments actually work in production environments.
I’ve covered what GitOps is, traditional CI/CD vs GitOps workflows, ArgoCD and FluxCD workflows, Kubernetes reconciliation loops, configuration drift detection, rollback workflows, GitOps architecture patterns, scenario-based interview questions, and more.
Whether you’re aiming for high-paying roles like DevOps engineer, platform engineer, site reliability engineer, or cloud engineer, learning Kubernetes, CI/CD, or modern cloud-native deployment workflows, this video is for you.
Leave a like, comment, and subscribe for practical breakdowns.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 00:35 What Is GitOps? 02:01 CI/CD vs GitOps 05:20 GitOps setup on Kubernetes 05:48 ArgoCD setup 06:47 FluxCD setup 07:46 ArgoCD vs FluxCD 07:56 Benefits of GitOps 08:36 Scenario-based questions 09:36 Conclusion 09:59 Recap 10:12 Outro
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------

item.title: Is Swarga Really Luxurious? The Secret of Hinduism’s 14 Lokas
item.description:
Most people think Hinduism speaks only about Swarga and Naraka. Heaven and hell. But Sanatana Dharma describes something far more vast. Our scriptures speak of 14 Lokas. Seven higher realms. Seven lower realms. And in the middle is Bhuloka, the world we live in.
#14lokas #heaven #hinduism #cosmology
But here is the surprising part.
Swarga is not the final goal. It is a higher loka, yes. A place of punya, beauty, and divine enjoyment. But it is still temporary.
Patala is not simply hell. It is described as a mysterious realm connected with Nagas, hidden wealth, and worlds beneath human perception.
And Bhuloka is not ordinary. It is Karma Bhumi. The place where choices matter. The place where dharma can be followed. The place where a jeeva can rise, fall, transform, and seek moksha.
In this video, we explore the deeper meaning of the Chaturdasha Lokas, from Atala and Patala to Swarga, Mahar, Jana, Tapa, and Satyaloka, and why Hindu cosmology is not just about places above and below Earth, but about karma, consciousness, rebirth, and liberation.
The real question is not just where these lokas are.
The real question is: If even Swarga is temporary, what is the true goal of human life?
Download the Temple Girl Kids app at templegirl.com for bedtime stories from India’s temples and tradition.
Chapters: 00:00 What if Swarga is not the final goal? 01:10 What are the 14 Lokas? 02:30 Seven higher and seven lower realms 04:00 Why Patala is not simply hell 06:30 The mystery of the Naga realms 08:30 What Swarga Loka really means 10:30 Why Swarga is temporary 12:00 Why Bhuloka is Karma Bhumi 14:00 Why human birth is considered rare 15:30 Moksha: beyond all lokas

item.title: CI/CD CRASH COURSE For Beginners | Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab
item.description:
In this video, I will break down how CI/CD workflows actually work in modern software and cloud environments so you can understand how code moves from development into production systems.
I have covered Continuous Integration, Continuous Delivery vs Continuous Deployment, pipeline stages, testing workflows, container registries, how modern CI/CD systems automate software delivery, and more. I’ve also covered how tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI work, their tradeoffs, how pipelines are structured in real-world projects, and how AI-powered platforms like Harness AI are changing modern DevOps workflows.
If you’re preparing for high-paying jobs like DevOps engineer, cloud engineer, site reliability engineer, or platform engineer, this video is for you.
Leave a like, comment and subscribe for more!
CHAPTERS 00:00 Intro 00:57 What is Continuous Integration? 01:24 What is Continuous Delivery? 01:37 What is Continuous Deployment? 02:27 CI/CD Workflow 04:17 Jenkins 05:33 Github Actions 07:00 GitLab CI 08:23 Harness AI 08:56 Takeaways 09:34 Outro

item.title: Night Sky
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Night Sky.

Night Sky centers around Franklin and Irene York, a couple who years ago discovered a chamber buried in their backyard which inexplicably leads to a strange, deserted planet. They've carefully guarded their secret ever since, but when an enigmatic young man enters their lives, the Yorks' quiet existence is quickly upended, and the mysterious chamber they thought they knew so well turns out to be much more than they could ever have imagined.

item.title: MASTER DevOps + AI Before 2026 Ends
item.description:
Guide+Bootcamp: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/05e6h
Half of 2026 is already over, and if you want to become a DevOps Engineer or an AI Engineer in 2026, there is still enough time, 192 days to be exact, to completely change your career trajectory.
And these two free hands-on bootcamps by KodeKloud are some of the best structured resources that I found really valuable.
Across the next 200 days, you’ll cover concepts like:
→ Linux & server administration → Git & version control → Docker & containers → Kubernetes & orchestration → CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins → Python environments & packaging → DVC & MLflow → Training workflows & fine-tuning → GPU deployments & model serving → FastAPI, Kubeflow, KServe & GitOps → Monitoring, deployment strategies & production AI workflows
And honestly, you don’t need to master everything.
You just need enough practical skills to: → build projects → understand workflows → and complete the final capstone projects properly
That’s where the real learning happens.

item.title: DevOps + LLM +AI Project w/ Docker, Kubernetes, vLLM | Resume Project for Beginners
item.description:
Project Guide + Slides: https://github.com/vishakhasadhwani/llm-deployment-demo/tree/main/visual-walkthrough-prompt-guide
One of the coolest part of this workflow was using Gamma for the slides: check it out here: https://gamma.1stcollab.com/vishakha.sadhwani_yt
In this video, I will walk you through how to deploy a local LLM chat application on a cloud-based GPU instance using real AI infrastructure components.
I’ve covered the complete deployment architecture, how inference engines like vLLM work, GPU-based model serving, Docker containerization, Nvidia container toolkit setup, Streamlit UI integration, and how the full request flow works from browser → frontend → inference server → GPU.
You will also learn how production-style LLM deployment patterns work, how AI models are packaged and exposed through APIs, and why tools like vLLM are becoming critical in modern AI infrastructure workflows.
This video is ideal for AI engineers, DevOps engineers, cloud engineers, MLOps learners, and anyone trying to understand how large language models are actually deployed in production environments.

item.title: Paper Girls
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Paper Girls.

Paper Girls follows four young girls who, while out delivering papers on the morning after Halloween in 1988, become unwittingly caught in a conflict between warring factions of time-travelers, sending them on an adventure through time that will save the world. As they travel between our present, the past, and the future — they encounter future versions of themselves and now must choose to embrace or reject their fate. An emotional adventure in which the girls and the women they eventually become are tough, their friendships are authentic, and their journey through time is epic.

item.title: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed.

Paula, a newly divorced mom, falls down a dangerous rabbit hole of blackmail, murder, and youth soccer.

Convinced she witnessed a crime — while simultaneously struggling through a custody battle and an identity crisis — Paula begins her own investigation, one that could unravel a greater conspiracy while also holding the keys to rebuilding her family and sense of self.

item.title: Drops of God
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Drops of God.

Drops of God is set in the world of gastronomy and fine wines, which are in mourning as Alexandre Léger, creator of the famous Léger Wine Guide and emblematic figure in oenology, has just passed away at his home in Tokyo at the age of 60. He left behind a daughter, Camille, who lives in Paris and hasn't seen her father since her parents separated when she was nine years old. When Camille flies to Tokyo and Léger's will is read, she discovers that her father has left her an extraordinary wine collection – the greatest collection in the world according to the experts. But, to claim the inheritance, Camille must compete with a brilliant young oenologist, Issei Tomine, who her father took under his wing and is referred to in Léger's will as his "spiritual son." But is his connection to Issei only spiritual?

item.title: Cape Fear
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Cape Fear.

A storm is coming for happily married attorneys Anna and Tom Bowden when Max Cady, the notorious killer they are responsible for putting behind bars, is let out of prison - and he wants vengeance.

item.title: R.J. Decker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: R.J. Decker.

R.J. Decker centers on the eponymous R.J. Decker, a disgraced newspaper photographer and ex-con who starts over as a private investigator in the colorful-if-crime-filled world of South Florida, tackling cases that range from slightly odd to outright bizarre with the help of his journalist ex, her police detective wife, and a shadowy new benefactor, a woman from his past who could be his greatest ally... or his one-way ticket back to prison.

item.title: Star City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star City.

Star City is a propulsive, paranoid thriller that takes us back to the key moment in the alt-history retelling of the space race — when the Soviet Union became the first nation to put a man on the moon. But this time, we explore the story from behind the Iron Curtain, showing the lives of the cosmonauts, the engineers and the intelligence officers embedded among them in the Soviet space program, and the risks they all took to propel humanity forward.

item.title: Mango Farmer Story | Final Decision | Dubai | India GDP | Youngsters | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara
item.description:
Mango Farmer Story | Final Decision | Dubai | India GDP | Youngsters | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA

item.title: FAANG Is Dead, MANGOS Is Here!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: FAANG Is Dead, MANGOS Is Here!
Resources: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/tzn7d
FAANG is no longer the dream among tech aspirants; MANGOS is the new thing.
There is a new acronym in the tech industry with all recent and upcoming companies that are hiring, MANGOS.
M - Meta A - Anthropic N - NVIDIA G - Google O - OpenAI S - SpaceX
I’ve covered the 7 skills that you must build to get into these top tech companies.
You don’t need to master all of these skills immediately; getting strong in even 4 areas can increase your chances of cracking them.

item.title: No Data, No AI – Why Data Analytics Matters | Live Session 2
item.description:
Welcome to Session 2 of our Data Analytics Demo! 🚀
If you missed our first session, don't worry—you're jumping in at the perfect time. In this stream, we are tackling a fundamental truth in the modern tech landscape: AI is only as good as the data it trains on. Without robust data analytics, even the most advanced Artificial Intelligence algorithms are virtually useless.
Today, we break down exactly why data analytics serves as the critical foundation for AI success.
📌 What We’ll Cover Today: The Data-AI Connection: Why AI completely relies on high-quality data infrastructure.
Garbage In, Garbage Out: How poor data quality breaks AI models and leads to flawed business insights.
The Role of Data Analytics: How parsing, cleaning, and analyzing data prepares it to power intelligent automation.
Live Walkthrough/Examples: Real-world scenarios demonstrating data analytics driving successful AI implementations.
Whether you are an aspiring data scientist, a business leader looking to implement AI, or just curious about the future of tech, this session will give you a clear roadmap of how data and AI work hand-in-hand.

item.title: No Data, No AI – Why Data Analytics Matters | Live Session
item.description:
Welcome to the live session! 🚀
Artificial Intelligence is changing the world, but AI is only as good as the data feeding it. In this session, we break down why Data Analytics is the absolute foundation of modern AI systems. Without clean, structured, and well-analyzed data, even the most advanced AI models fall flat.
What we’ll cover:
Why data is the true "fuel" for AI and Machine Learning.
The critical role of a Data Analyst in an AI-driven industry.
Real-world examples of data failures leading to AI failures.
Q&A session – bring your questions!
📌 Don't forget to like, subscribe, and turn on notifications to stay updated with future live sessions and tech deep-dives!
#DataAnalytics #ArtificialIntelligence #MachineLearning #TechLive #BigData

item.title: OG Pitch meeting by barbell pitch meeting 😆
item.description:
🔥 OG Pitch Meeting | Telugu y 🔥
What if OG was pitched in a meeting room before production? 😆 In this episode of Pitch Meetings, we take a hilarious look at the story, characters, and mass moments from OG starring Pawan Kalyan.
From over-the-top action sequences to unexpected plot twists, nothing escapes our Pitch Meeting treatment! Sit back and enjoy this fun parody packed with Telugu humor and movie satire.
⚠️ This video is made purely for entertainment and parody purposes.
🔥 OG Pitch Meeting | తెలుగు 🔥
OG సినిమా షూటింగ్‌కి ముందే Pitch Meeting జరిగితే ఎలా ఉండేది? 😆 ఈ వీడియోలో OG కథ, పాత్రలు, మాస్ ఎలివేషన్స్, లాజిక్ మోమెంట్స్ అన్నింటినీ సరదాగా ట్రోల్ చేస్తూ Pitch Meeting స్టైల్‌లో చూపించాం.
పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ ఫ్యాన్స్‌కి, తెలుగు సినిమా ప్రేమికులకి ఇది ఫుల్ ఎంటర్‌టైన్మెంట్!
⚠️ ఈ వీడియో పూర్తిగా వినోదం మరియు పేరడీ కోసం మాత్రమే రూపొందించబడింది.
#OG #PawanKalyan #OGPitchMeeting #BarbellPitchMeetings #TeluguCinema #Tollywood #MovieReview #Comedy #Parody #OGMovie #barbell #barbellpitchmeetings #telugucinema #moviereview

item.title: Spider-Noir
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spider-Noir.

Spider-Noir tells the story of Ben Reilly, a seasoned, down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, who is forced to grapple with his past life, following a deeply personal tragedy, as the city's one and only superhero.

item.title: Ponies
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ponies.

Moscow, 1977. Two "PONIES" ("persons of no interest" in intelligence speak) work anonymously as secretaries in the American Embassy. That is until their husbands are killed under mysterious circumstances in the USSR, and the pair become CIA operatives. Bea is an over educated, Russian speaking child of Soviet immigrants. Her cohort, Twila, is a small town girl who is as abrasive as she is fearless. Together, they work to uncover a vast Cold War conspiracy and solve the mystery that made them widows in the first place.

item.title: Agile, Scrum, & Product Delivery: Practical Masterclass Demo
item.description:
Welcome to this practical masterclass demo on Agile, Scrum, and Product Delivery!
In this session, we break down theory into real-world practice, showing you exactly how modern product teams collaborate, plan, and deliver value efficiently. Whether you are an aspiring Product Owner, a Scrum Master, or a developer looking to understand the bigger picture, this demo provides actionable insights you can apply immediately.
🎯 What You'll Learn in This Demo: The Agile Mindset: Why it matters and how it shifts product development.
Scrum Framework Essentials: A look into roles, events, and artifacts.
Practical Product Delivery: Moving seamlessly from a product backlog to a shippable increment.
🕒 Timestamps (Feel free to adjust these based on your actual video timeline!)
00:00 - Introduction & Overview
02:15 - Core Principles of Agile & Scrum
05:40 - Practical Walkthrough: Managing the Backlog

item.title: DAX in Power BI
item.description:
DAX is what separates Power BI users from Power BI developers.
Most people can drag fields onto a canvas and call it a dashboard.
But the moment someone asks for year-over-year growth, a running total, or a metric that respects filters the way the business actually thinks - you need DAX.
And the first real test is knowing when to use a calculated column vs a measure.
Get that wrong and your model bloats, your reports slow down, and your numbers stop making sense when someone clicks a slicer.
Get it right and you stop being the person who builds reports and you become the person who builds models other people build reports on.
____________________________________________
RESOURCES:
💻Analyst Builder - https://www.analystbuilder.com/
📖Take my Full MySQL Course Here: https://bit.ly/3tqOipr 📖Take my Full Python Course Here: https://bit.ly/48O581R 📖Practice Technical Interview Questions: https://bit.ly/46pDqqL

item.title: Best Medicine
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Best Medicine.

In Best Medicine a brilliant surgeon leaves Boston to become a small-town doctor where he spent childhood summers. Despite his medical skills, his rude manner alienates locals as he battles hidden phobias and struggles with personal connections.

item.title: Widow's Bay
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Widow's Bay.

Widow's Bay is about a mysteriously cursed New England island and its superstitious citizens, led by a mayor who refuses to believe their warnings.

item.title: Margo's Got Money Troubles
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Margo's Got Money Troubles.

Margo Millet is the daughter of a Hooters waitress and an ex-pro wrestler. Now an unemployed single mother in her early 20s, Margo is struggling to make ends meet, leading her to launch an OnlyFans account. When her father reenters her life, she starts incorporating his lessons from the pro wrestling world into her OnlyFans work, leading to unexpected success.

item.title: Dutton Ranch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Dutton Ranch.

The Dutton Ranch, home to Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler, is a testament to the peace they sought, fought for, and nearly died for, as they've come to cherish their 7,000-acre land. With tough times and stiff competition, Beth and Rip do what they must to survive, all while ensuring Carter becomes the man he's supposed to be.

As Beth and Rip fight to build a future together - far from the ghosts of Yellowstone - they collide with brutal new realities and a ruthless rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire. In South Texas, blood runs deeper, forgiveness is fleeting, and the cost of survival might just be your soul.

item.title: Top 10 Best Action Movies of 2026 so far
item.description: Looking for the year’s biggest hits? Our guide to the New Action movies of 2026 highlights the must-watch blockbusters that are redefining the genre. From the high-stakes chaos of war machine to the gritty survival of Jason Statham’s Shelter, this list covers it all. While exploring the New Action movies of 2026, you'll find everything from sci-fi thrills to martial arts spectacles. Stay updated on the New Action movies of 2026 to ensure you never miss a single adrenaline-pumping moment.

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: 10 Japanese Movies & Series Better Than Hollywood
item.description: Japanese TV is having a massive moment on Netflix, and for good reason. From the high-stakes survival of Alice in Borderland to the brutal action of Last Samurai Standing, , Japanese storytelling isn't just trending—it’s taking over. That’s why in this video we are counting down the 10 Best Japanese TV Shows on Netflix that belong right at the top of your watchlist. Let's dive in. 00:00 – Intro 00:22 – Alice in Borderland 01:39 – Last Samurai Standing 02:49 – The Journalist 04:03 – House of Ninjas 05:06 – Tokyo Swindlers 06:15 – The Days 07:30 – Yu Yu Hakusho 08:39 – Age of Samurai: Battle for Japan 09:49 – Giri/Haji 10:53 – Shōgun 11:55 – The Queen of Villains

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: Which Surgery is Best? | Laparoscopy Surgery | Open Surgery | Robotic Surgery | Dr.Ravikanth Kongara
item.description:
Which Surgery is Best? | Laparoscopy Surgery | Open Surgery | Robotic Surgery | Dr.Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA
Health Disclaimer: ___________________ The information in this Video is Designed for EDUCATIONAL Purpose Only. It is not intended to be a substitute for informed medical advice or care. You Should not use this information to diagnose or treat any health problems. Please consult a doctor with any questions or concerns you might have regarding your or your child's condition.

item.title: Types of Anesthesia | What Role of Anesthesia in Surgery | Pain Killer | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara
item.description:
Types of Anesthesia | What Role of Anesthesia in Surgery | Pain Killer | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA
Health Disclaimer: ___________________ The information in this Video is Designed for EDUCATIONAL Purpose Only. It is not intended to be a substitute for informed medical advice or care. item.title: What is H. Pylori Bacteria? | How to Treat? | Stomach Acid | Cancer | Ulcer | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara
item.description:
What is H. Pylori Bacteria? | How to Treat? | Stomach Acid | Cancer | Ulcer | Dr. Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA
Health Disclaimer: ___________________ The information in this Video is Designed for EDUCATIONAL Purpose Only. It is not intended to be a substitute for informed medical advice or care. You Should not use this information to diagnose or treat any health problems. Please consult a doctor with any questions or concerns you might have regarding your or your child's condition.

Does eating eggs cause cancer? | What is the truth behind this | Healthy Life | Dr.Ravikanth Kongara --*****-- గత 12 సంవత్సరాలుగా రెండు తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల ప్రజలకి అత్యాధునిక ప్రమాణాలతో సరికొత్త ఆధునిక వైద్య సేవలని డాక్టర్ కొంగర రవికాంత్ గారు అందిస్తున్నారు. విజయవాడలోని వారి కర్పోరేట్ స్థాయి హాస్పటల్లో తమ విశేష అనుభవంతో సామాన్యులకి కూడా అందుబాటులో ఉండే నాణ్యమైన వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తూ గొప్ప పేరు సాదించారు.
అన్ని రకాల గ్యాస్ట్రో, బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీ, లాపరోస్కోపీ సమస్యలకి చికిత్స అందిస్తూ దక్షిణ భారతదేశంలోనే నెలకు అత్యధిక బేరియాట్రిక్ సర్జరీలు చేస్తు గొప్ప ఫలితాలు సాదించారు. అంతేగాక 200 నుండి 250 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న అత్యంత ప్రమాదకర బేరియాట్రిక్ సమస్యకి శస్త్రచికిత్స చేసి అసాధ్యాన్ని సుసాధ్యం చేసారు. సుమారు 200 కిలోల కంటే ఎక్కువ బరువున్న సూపర్ ఒబేసిటీ పేషెంట్లు మంచి ఫలితాలని పొందారు.
విజయవాడలో మొట్ట మొదటిసారిగా విదేశి తరహాలో అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలతో 24 గంటలు వైద్యుల పర్యావేక్షణలో వైద్య సేవలు అందిస్తున్నారు. 100 పడకలతో పాటు అత్యవసర సమయంలో ఆంబులెన్స్ సౌకర్యం కలదు.
Dr. Ravikanth Kongara MBBS, MS, DNB(Gastro-NIMS) Ravi Hospital, Bariatric, gastro, laparoscopy, Swathi Press - opp Kovelamudi Street, Suryaraopeta, Vijayawada - 2, Andhra Pradesh: 520002, Phone: 0888 183 8888, 888 184 8888. https://g.co/kgs/XJHvYA
Health Disclaimer: ___________________ The information in this Video is Designed for EDUCATIONAL Purpose Only. It is not intended to be a substitute for informed medical advice or care. You Should not use this information to diagnose or treat any health problems. Please consult a doctor with any questions or concerns you might have regarding your or your child's condition.
